## Build Submission

Thank you for preparing a Media Tiles build submission.

Before submitting, please use the Media Tiles submission page:

https://guyititian.github.io/media-tiles/submit.html

That page will validate your files locally and generate the review text for this issue.

---

## Required Attachments

Please attach all three files before submitting:

- [ ] `build.json`
- [ ] `nuvio-collections.json`
- [ ] `aiometadata-catalogs.json`

If you are on mobile and do not see an attachment option in the GitHub app, open this issue in Safari/Chrome or submit from a desktop browser.

---

## Submission Details

Paste the generated review text from the Media Tiles submission page below this line.

---

PASTE GENERATED REVIEW TEXT HERE

---

## Reviewer Checklist

For maintainer use:

- [ ] `build.json` is valid JSON.
- [ ] `nuvio-collections.json` is valid JSON.
- [ ] `aiometadata-catalogs.json` is valid JSON.
- [ ] Build title, creator, category, language, and description are complete.
- [ ] Platform is listed as `Nuvio`.
- [ ] Catalog layer is listed as `AIOMetadata`.
- [ ] Import style is clear.
- [ ] Nuvio collections JSON contains collections and folders.
- [ ] Folders contain catalog sources.
- [ ] AIOMetadata JSON contains a top-level `catalogs` array.
- [ ] Artwork URLs load or are clearly documented.
- [ ] Setup notes are understandable for new users.
- [ ] Known issues are documented.
- [ ] Build is ready to publish.
